_notes: All entries are sanctoral calendar feast titles (no scripture). Pattern used: S.=圣, Papæ=教宗, Martyris=殉道者, Confessoris=宣信者(per glossary §10), Episcopi=主教, Ecclesiæ Doctoris=教会圣师, Virginis=童贞女, Viduæ=寡妇, Abbatis=院长, Apostoli=使徒, Evangelistæ=福音书作者, Presbyteri=司铎, Archangeli=总领天使, Regis=王/君王, Imperatoris=皇帝, Pœnitentis=悔罪者, Opificis=工人, O.N.(Ordinis Nostri)=（本会）. Locked names applied: Gregory=额我略, Gregory the Great=大额我略, Leo=良, Leo the Great=大良(I), John Chrysostom=金口若望, Jerome=耶柔米, Hilary=希拉里, Irenaeus=爱任纽, Gabriel(archangel)=加百列(CUV), Joseph=约瑟, James(apostle)=雅各, John(apostle)=约翰, Mark(evangelist)=马可, Luke=路加, Matthew=马太, Matthias=马提亚, Martin=马丁(per glossary Saint Martin=圣马丁). UNCERTAIN coinages (no CUV/established form, flag for review): many less-common saints transliterated by best judgment — Felix=斐理斯, Felicitas=斐理西塔, Ferdinand=斐迪南, Fidelis=斐德理, Florian=佛罗里安, Frances of Rome=罗马的方济加, Cabrini=卡布里尼, Borgia=博尔吉亚, Caracciolo=卡拉乔洛, Fridolin=弗里多林, Galla=加拉, Gallicanus=加利卡努斯, Gelasius=杰拉旭, Gertrude=日多达, Giles(Ægidius)=艾智德, Godehard=戈德哈德, Gorgonius=戈尔戈尼乌斯, Gregory Barbarigo=巴尔巴里戈, Gregory Thaumaturgus=行奇迹者额我略, Gregory the Illuminator(大亚美尼亚)=额我略, William=威廉, Hadrian/Adrian=哈德良, Hedwig=赫德维希, Henry=亨利, Hermenegild=赫尔梅内吉尔德, Hermes=赫尔墨斯, Hilarion=希拉里翁, Hormisdas=何弥达, Hyacintha Mariscotti=玛利斯科蒂的雅钦塔, Hyacinth=雅钦, Hyginus=希吉努斯, Januarius=亚努阿里乌斯, Ignatius=依纳爵(per robo prompt example), Joachim=约阿敬, Jane Frances de Chantal=若望·方济加·弗雷米奥·德·尚塔尔, John of Capistrano=卡皮斯特拉诺的约翰, John of the Cross=十字若望, John of God=天主的若望, John of Matha=玛达的约翰, John Eudes=若望·欧德, John Gualbert=若望·古阿尔伯, John Leonardi=若望·良纳, John Vianney=若望·玛利亚·维亚内, John Nepomucene=若望·内波穆克, John Baptist de la Salle=若翰·喇沙, John Baptist de Rossi=若翰·罗西, John Bosco=若望·鲍思高, John Cantius=坎齐的约翰, John Damascene=大马士革的若望, Josaphat=约撒法, Joseph Calasanz=约瑟·加拉桑, Joseph of Cupertino=库珀蒂诺的约瑟, Isidore the Farmer=农夫依西多禄, Isidore=依西多禄, Juan Diego=胡安·迭戈, Juliana Falconieri=法尔科涅里的茱莉亚娜, Julius=犹利乌斯, Justin Martyr=游斯丁(per glossary 殉道者游斯丁), Juvenal=犹维纳利斯, Lawrence of Brindisi=布林迪西的劳伦斯, Lawrence Justinian=劳伦斯·儒斯定, Lawrence=劳伦斯, Leonard of Port Maurice=莫里斯港的良纳, Liborius=利波里乌斯, Linus=理诺, Lucy=路济亚, Lucius=路基乌斯, Louis=路易(robo glossary Louis=路易斯 but for King St Louis 路易 is more common — used 路易; flag), Maria Goretti=玛利亚·葛瑞蒂, Marcellus=玛策禄, Mark(pope)=玛尔谷, Margaret of Cortona=科尔托纳的玛加利大, Margaret Mary Alacoque=玛加利大·玛利亚·亚拉高, Margaret(queen of Scotland)=玛加利大, Margaret(VM)=玛加利大, Mary of Egypt=埃及的马利亚, Mary Magdalene de Pazzi=帕齐的玛利亚·玛达肋纳, Mary Magdalene(penitent)=抹大拉的马利亚(CUV), Martha=马大(CUV), Martin de Porres=玛尔定·德·波雷斯, Martina=玛尔蒂娜, Mathilda=玛蒂尔达, Maurus=茂禄, Melchiades=弥尔弟亚德, Gabriel Possenti(a Virgine Perdolente)=痛苦圣母的加俾额尔. Two stray English-language source strings ('S. Iohn Baptist Rossi Confessor', 'S. Iohn I, pope and martyr') translated per their meaning. Vidua rendered 寡妇 (CUV register) rather than 孀妇.
